ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., 1BHK, 2BHK, Few Items) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property (e.g., residential, commercial, vehicle) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the property (e.g., square footage, cubic capacity) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the property (e.g., number of bedrooms, amenities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_ranges" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the distance range (e.g., 0-100 KM) */,
  "range_description" TEXT /* Description of the distance range */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance in kilometers */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance in kilometers */,
  "central_point" TEXT /* Central point from which distances are measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_ranges" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distance range */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* The price range formatted as a string (e.g., '4500-9500') */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price in the range */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price in the range */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing range becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_ranges_distance_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_id") REFERENCES distance_ranges ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_ranges_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, viewer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical pricing entry */,
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific pricing entry */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price recorded for the specific entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific property */,
  "distance" REAL /* Actual distance from the central point */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Market trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_pricing_id FOREIGN KEY ("pricing_id") REFERENCES pricing_ranges ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user entry for the agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent on properties sold */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent joined */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent left, if applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Browser and device information */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the property was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "amenity_id")
)
